message:
feat(db): migrate from C-backed SqliteConnection to FrankenConnection (DbConn) throughout DB crate

Replace all usages of sqlmodel_sqlite::SqliteConnection with the project's
DbConn (FrankenConnection) type across pool initialization, integrity checks,
WAL checkpoints, schema migrations, and all test helpers. FrankenConnection now
supports the PRAGMA and DDL operations that previously required the C-backed
driver, making the dual-connection architecture unnecessary.

Key changes:
- pool.rs: Use DbConn for DB-wide init, integrity checks, WAL checkpoints, and
  quick_check. Call migrate_to_latest_base instead of migrate_to_latest to skip
  FTS virtual table migrations while still running trigger DDL.
- schema.rs: Rename is_fts_or_trigger_migration to is_fts_migration since
  triggers are now supported by FrankenConnection. Update all doc comments to
  remove C-backed SQLite references. Replace SqliteConnection with DbConn in
  enforce_base_mode_cleanup, enforce_runtime_fts_cleanup, and all test functions.
- integrity.rs: Update recovery documentation to reference checkpoint + VACUUM
  instead of VACUUM INTO.
- queries.rs: Replace all test helper SqliteConnection usages with DbConn.
- Integration tests: Update identity_fts_cleanup, pool_exhaustion, and
  schema_migration tests to use DbConn consistently.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
